properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Faithful, forever You are faithful Father to the fatherless You uphold the one who feels forsaken You are faithful, God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Faithful, forever You are faithful Lover of the wounded heart You defend the poor and the forgotten You are faithful, God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I will sing to the maker of Heaven and Earth God, You reign forever and Your will endure Faithful and true is the name of the Lord You are faithful, God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Faithful, forever You are faithful Shelter for the fragile soul You lift us up, You hold us all together You are faithful, God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are there in every season of my soul You are there, You're the anchor that will hold You are there, in the valley of the shadows You are faithful, God
